turnaround_reason: PEO (Professional Employer Organization) for SMBs down 50% from $65.74 high to $32.95 on SMB hiring weakness (worksite employee growth turned negative) plus heavy spending on the Workday partnership (~$48M opex in 2025). Q1 2026 showed signs of stabilization: revenue +2%, net income $33M, Adj EBITDA $103M. The HR Scale solution co-developed with Workday launched early 2026 — first quarter of revenue contribution.
bullish_points: PEO penetration only 17% of target SMB market = huge structural runway if Insperity holds share
Workday partnership and HR Scale launch position Insperity to move upmarket to middle-market clients where Workday is dominant
$555M cash > $430M debt = net cash position, rare in this watchlist; strong balance sheet through any cycle
Q1 2026 EPS beat by 6%; Q1 2025 missed by 190% — the year-over-year delta is exactly the stabilization narrative
Analyst target mean $39.50 vs $32.95 = 20% upside on consensus
bearish_points: Workday partnership ~$48M opex drag in 2025; HR Scale revenue contribution will take 2-3 years to offset
SMB hiring environment uncertain — if small businesses pull back further on headcount, worksite employee count could shrink
Q4 2025 missed badly (-190% EPS surprise) — execution wasn't smooth coming into the turnaround attempt
Forward P/E 11.8 isn't deep value; this is a quality compounder at a fair price, not a special situation
EV/EBITDA 72x looks ugly (Q4 EBITDA was weak); cleaner multiples will require 2-3 quarters of EBITDA growth
catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings July 30 — HR Scale early customer adoption metrics; worksite employee growth trajectory; Workday partnership unit economics commentary
suggested_trade: Spot position. Highest quality balance sheet in today's batch + concrete partnership catalyst + reasonable valuation. Less torque than CLVT but lower downside. Consider it the 'sleep at night' name of the day's watchlist. 1x normal sizing.
key_risk: HR Scale uptake disappoints — Workday's middle-market clients don't see enough value in the bundled PEO offering; worksite employee growth stays negative through 2026; recession deepens.
would_skip_if: Worksite employee growth stays negative in Q2; HR Scale customer count is not disclosed in Q2 prepared remarks; SMB benefit cost inflation accelerates
